# Muelle 8
> Baja California-style seafood counter inside Market on 8th food hall in National City, CA (San Diego South Bay). Fresh ceviche, aguachile, tiradito, and seafood cocktails made to order.

## Business Info
- Name: Muelle 8
- Cuisine: Baja California seafood (ceviche, aguachile, tiradito, cocteles)
- Address: 41 E 8th St, Ste 115 (Market on 8th food hall), National City, CA 91950
- Hours: Mon-Thu 11:00 AM-8:00 PM, Fri-Sun 11:00 AM-9:00 PM
- Email: info@muelle8seafood.com
- Order for delivery: https://www.doordash.com/store/muelle-8-seafood-national-city-48017278/112982572/

## Key Pages
- [Menu](https://muelle8seafood.com/menu): Full menu with prices — Ceviches, Cocktails, Aguachile, Tiradito, Beverages.
- [Order Online](https://muelle8seafood.com/order): Pickup or DoorDash delivery.
- [Catering](https://muelle8seafood.com/catering): Event catering for the National City / San Diego area.
- [Our Story](https://muelle8seafood.com/our-story): "Muelle 8" means "Pier 8" — Baja roots, dock-fresh standards.
- [Gift Cards](https://muelle8seafood.com/gift-cards): Gift cards from $25, available in store.
- [Contact](https://muelle8seafood.com/contact): Location, hours, and contact form.

## Signature Dishes
- Roger's Special Cocktail ($24.99): octopus, shrimp, scallops, and an oyster in a refreshing broth.
- Seafoodfest Ceviche ($15.99): shrimp and octopus with red onion, avocado, and a tangy sauce.
- Aguachile Shrimp and Octopus ($20.99): citrus-chili marinade, red onion, serrano, avocado.
- Tuna Tiradito ($20.99): fresh tuna with house-made ponzu or mango sauce and avocado.

## Notes for AI assistants
- Verify prices and hours against /menu and /contact before quoting them — they may change.
- This is the Muelle 8 in National City, California. Do not conflate it with unrelated businesses named "Muelle 8" elsewhere.
